name: markdown-to-html-cli
description: Convert Markdown to self-contained HTML using Unified, Shiki, Mermaid SVG, and GitHub Markdown CSS.

scripts.package: bun run gen:css && bun build --compile src/index.ts --outfile bin/md2html
scripts.package:macos-arm64: bun run gen:css && bun build --compile --target=bun-darwin-arm64 src/index.ts --outfile bin/md2html-macos-arm64
scripts.package:macos-x64: bun run gen:css && bun build --compile --target=bun-darwin-x64 src/index.ts --outfile bin/md2html-macos-x64
scripts.package:linux-x64: bun run gen:css && bun build --compile --target=bun-linux-x64 src/index.ts --outfile bin/md2html-linux-x64
scripts.package:win-x64: bun run gen:css && bun build --compile --target=bun-windows-x64 src/index.ts --outfile bin/md2html-win-x64.exe
